content.text:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/YatCC/test/task1/CMakeLists.txt:
     1	file(REAL_PATH ../rtlib _rtlib_dir)
     2	file(REAL_PATH ../task0 _task0_out BASE_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR})
     3	
     4	# 生成官方测例表
     5	if(NOT TASK1_CASES_TXT)
     6	  set(_task1_cases "")
     7	  foreach(_case ${TEST_CASES})
     8	    if(NOT _case MATCHES ${TASK1_EXCLUDE_REGEX})
     9	      list(APPEND _task1_cases ${_case})
    10	    endif()
    11	  endforeach()
    12	  set(TASK1_CASES_TXT ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/cases.txt)
    13	  string(REPLACE ";" "\n" _lines "${_task1_cases}")
    14	  file(WRITE ${TASK1_CASES_TXT} "${_lines}")
    15	else()
    16	  exec_program(
    17	    ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/..
    18	    ARGS common.py ${TEST_CASES_DIR} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    19	         ${TASK1_CASES_TXT}
    20	    OUTPUT_VARIABLE _task1_cases)
    21	endif()
    22	
    23	# 生成官方测例答案
    24	add_custom_target(
    25	  task1-answer
    26	  ${Python3_EXECUTABLE}
    27	  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/answer.py
    28	  ${_task0_out} # 传入 task0 的输出目录，而不是 TEST_CASES_DIR
    29	  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    30	  ${TEST_CASES_TXT}
    31	  ${CLANG_EXECUTABLE}
    32	  ${_rtlib_dir}
    33	  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    34	  USES_TERMINAL
    35	  SOURCES answer.py)
    36	
    37	add_dependencies(task1-answer task0-answer)
    38	
    39	# 对实验进行评分
    40	add_custom_target(
    41	  task1-score
    42	  COMMAND
    43	    ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/score.py ${TEST_CASES_DIR}
    44	    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR} ${TASK1_CASES_TXT} ${CTEST_COMMAND}
    45	    ${TASK1_LOG_LEVEL}
    46	  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    47	  USES_TERMINAL
    48	  SOURCES score.py)
    49	
    50	add_dependencies(task1-score task1 task1-answer)
    51	
    52	# 为每个官方测例创建一个测试和评分
    53	foreach(_case ${_task1_cases})
    54	  set(_output_dir ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${_case})
    55	  file(MAKE_DIRECTORY ${_output_dir})
    56	  add_test(NAME task1/${_case} COMMAND task1 ${_task0_out}/${_case}
    57	                                       ${_output_dir}/output.txt)
    58	  add_test(
    59	    NAME test1/${_case}
    60	    COMMAND
    61	      ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/score.py
    62	      ${TEST_CASES_DIR} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR} ${TASK1_CASES_TXT}
    63	      ${CTEST_COMMAND} ${TASK1_LOG_LEVEL} --single ${_case})
    64	endforeach()
    65	
    66	message(AUTHOR_WARNING "请在构建 task0-answer 后再使用 task1 的测试项目。")
    67	
    68	# ############################################################################ #
    69	# 提供 diy 功能，对单独的cases目录进行重新编译与评分，跳过缓存机制。
    70	# ############################################################################ #
    71	
    72	# 生成 diy 测例答案
    73	add_custom_target(
    74	  task1-diy-answer
    75	  ${Python3_EXECUTABLE}
    76	  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/answer.py
    77	  ${_task0_out}/diy-cases # 测例目录
    78	  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/diy-cases # 输出目录
    79	  ${DIY_TEST_CASES_TXT} # 测例表
    80	  ${CLANG_EXECUTABLE}
    81	  ${_rtlib_dir}
    82	  --no-cache # 禁用缓存机制
    83	  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    84	  USES_TERMINAL
    85	  SOURCES answer.py)
    86	
    87	add_dependencies(task1-diy-answer task0-diy-answer)
    88	
    89	# 对 diy 实验进行评分
    90	add_custom_target(
    91	  task1-diy-score
    92	  COMMAND
    93	    ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/score.py
    94	    ${DIY_TEST_CASES_DIR} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/diy-cases
    95	    ${DIY_TEST_CASES_TXT} ${CTEST_COMMAND} ${TASK1_LOG_LEVEL}
    96	  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    97	  USES_TERMINAL
    98	  SOURCES score.py)
    99	
   100	add_dependencies(task1-diy-score task1 task1-diy-answer)
   101	
   102	# 为每个 diy 测例创建一个测试和评分
   103	foreach(_diy_case ${DIY_TEST_CASES})
   104	  set(_diy_output_dir ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/diy-cases/${_diy_case})
   105	  file(MAKE_DIRECTORY ${_diy_output_dir})
   106	  add_test(NAME task1-diy/${_diy_case}
   107	           COMMAND task1 ${_task0_out}/diy-cases/${_diy_case}
   108	                   ${_diy_output_dir}/output.txt)
   109	  add_test(
   110	    NAME test1-diy/${_diy_case}
   111	    COMMAND
   112	      ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/score.py
   113	      ${DIY_TEST_CASES_DIR} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/diy-cases
   114	      ${DIY_TEST_CASES_TXT} ${CTEST_COMMAND} ${TASK1_LOG_LEVEL} --single
   115	      ${_diy_case})
   116	endforeach()
   117	
   118	message(AUTHOR_WARNING "请在构建 task0-diy-answer 后再使用 task1 的 diy 测试项目。")
   119
